Navbar.promptPurpose: Design a minimalist navbar for a SaaS landing page. It should have a company logo on the left, navigation links (Features, Pricing, About), and a
button on the right. Use a white or transparent background with dark text. The navbar should be fixed at the top. Include a mobile hamburger.

Hero.promptPurpose: Design a compelling hero section for a SaaS product. It should have a bold headline about the product, a subheading, and a primary CTA button. This is not a saas landing page for software, this is a landing page for a SaaS product youre building. The background should be dark with a gradient, and include visual elements like product mockups or dashboards. There should be a small social proof or stat bar below the hero (like

Features.promptPurpose: Design a features section with 3-4 key features of the SaaS product. Each feature should have an icon, title, description, and a demo or screenshot. Cta.promptPurpose: Design a conversion-focused CTA section. It should have a bold headline, subheading, and a primary button. The background should have a soft gradient or pattern. Include a secondary action like
. Add social proof logos below the button.

Footer.promptPurpose: Design a full footer with multiple columns: logo/description, product links, resources, company info, and social media icons. Include newsletter signup and copyright notice. Clean dark background with light text. Stacks on mobile.
